feed.description: Photography conversations: craft, storytelling, workflow, and making images under real constraints.
feed.title: Frame & Light

bullets: Today we're talking about lighting design, and I'm joined by Daniel Olufemi, commercial lighting director.
Daniel Olufemi, thanks for being here.
This episode is brought to you by Adobe.
